variants: Anastasia Cho, an expert in Industrial Design, has made a significant impact on her field with her published work, the 'Celestial Loom Blueprint.' She is an active member of the Xanadu Mapmakers, where she dives into collaborative projects that fuse creativity and technicality. Aliyah Kader served as her mentor and doctoral advisor, shaping her professional trajectory and skillset. The Silver Thread Foundation has been a primary funding source for her innovative endeavors, enabling her to explore new design possibilities. Through her commitment and contributions, Anastasia continues to inspire future generations in the realm of design.
